RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0036 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Sofia Patel Date of Birth: 15/07/1986 SSN (tokenized): TKN-672188 Annual Income: $65,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $58,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN78362AL Tesla Model 3 2017 ICE New 40,000 VIN20718AL Tesla Civic 2023 Hybrid New 42,000 Authorized Signature: Sofia Patel
